title: Sign in and reach the dashboard
description: An authenticated user can sign in with email and password and land on the dashboard with protected access available.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Toggle to login mode
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Verify the authenticated dashboard is displayed
Verify protected FinOps pages are accessible

title: Save AWS configuration and verify the connection
description: An authenticated user can enter AWS read-only credentials, save them, and verify that the connection is accepted.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/settings
Fill in a valid AWS access key into the access key field
Fill in a valid AWS secret access key into the secret key field
Select a valid AWS region
Save the AWS configuration
Verify the connection
Verify a successful connection confirmation is visible
Verify the AWS configuration is shown as saved

title: Register and reach the dashboard
description: A new user can switch to registration mode, create an account with email and password, and land on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Toggle to registration mode
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Verify the authenticated dashboard is displayed
Verify protected FinOps pages are accessible

title: Access the dashboard after signing in
description: An authenticated user can sign in and reach the main dashboard summary without losing access to protected pages.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Verify the dashboard summary is displayed
Verify the user can continue to protected FinOps pages

title: Review the dashboard cost summary
description: An authenticated user can open the dashboard and review the estimated monthly bill, potential savings, active resource count, and service cost distribution.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click the dashboard overview link
Verify summary cards are displayed
Verify the service cost distribution chart is displayed

title: Run a cost optimization scan and review recommendations
description: A user can run a scan, inspect recommendation cards with savings details, and apply an optimization action that updates the result view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click the scanner page link
Run a cost optimization scan
Apply an optimization action for a recommendation
Verify recommendation cards are displayed
Verify the optimization result is reflected in the recommendations

title: View historical cost trend reports
description: An authenticated user can open the reports page and see historical cost trend charts for monthly analytics.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/reports
Verify historical cost trend charts are displayed
Verify monthly cost analytics are visible

title: View historical cost trends in reports
description: An authenticated user can open the reports page and compare historical cost trends across months using the available analytics charts.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click the reports page link
Verify historical cost trend charts are displayed
Verify monthly comparison data is displayed

title: Persist AWS configuration for the session
description: An authenticated user can save AWS credentials and return later in the same session to see the configuration remains available.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/settings
Fill in a valid AWS access key into the access key field
Fill in a valid AWS secret access key into the secret key field
Select a valid AWS region
Save the AWS configuration
Click the dashboard overview link
Return to the AWS settings page
Verify the saved AWS configuration remains visible
Verify the settings page still shows a configured state

title: Review flagged resources from a scan
description: A user can run a scan and inspect flagged resources with resource identifiers, service status, idle reason, and potential savings.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click the scanner page link
Run a cost optimization scan
Verify flagged resources are displayed
Verify idle reason and potential savings fields are displayed

title: Show email validation for an invalid sign-in address
description: A user entering an invalid email format on the authentication screen sees validation feedback and cannot proceed successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Toggle to login mode
Fill in the email field with an invalid email format
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Verify email validation feedback is visible

title: Compare cost changes across periods
description: An authenticated user can review the reports page and compare cost trends across different months.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/reports
Scroll to the historical analytics section
Verify multiple periods of cost trend data are visible
Verify both bar and line trend visualizations are displayed

title: Reject AWS settings when a required field is missing
description: An authenticated user sees validation when trying to save AWS configuration without completing all required fields.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/settings
Fill in a valid AWS access key into the access key field
Select a valid AWS region
Save the AWS configuration
Verify a validation error is visible for the missing AWS secret access key
Verify the configuration is not shown as saved

title: Switch between login and registration modes
description: A user can toggle the authentication form between sign-in and registration modes and continue entering credentials.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Toggle to registration mode
Verify the registration form is displayed
Toggle to login mode
Verify the login form is displayed

title: Reject AWS settings when the region is invalid
description: An authenticated user sees validation when selecting an invalid AWS region before saving AWS configuration.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/settings
Fill in a valid AWS access key into the access key field
Fill in a valid AWS secret access key into the secret key field
Select an invalid AWS region value if available
Save the AWS configuration
Verify a region validation error is visible
Verify the configuration is not shown as saved

title: Handle an empty reports state
description: An authenticated user sees an empty-state message on reports when historical cost data is not available.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/reports
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify historical charts are not displayed
